"D:\Program Files\winlibs-x86_64-posix-seh-gcc-14.2.0-mingw-w64ucrt-12.0.0-r2\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\snake.dir/objects.a
"D:\Program Files\winlibs-x86_64-posix-seh-gcc-14.2.0-mingw-w64ucrt-12.0.0-r2\mingw64\bin\ar.exe" qc CMakeFiles\snake.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\snake.dir\objects1.rsp
"D:\Program Files\winlibs-x86_64-posix-seh-gcc-14.2.0-mingw-w64ucrt-12.0.0-r2\mingw64\bin\g++.exe" -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\snake.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o snake.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libsnake.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\snake.dir\linkLibs.rsp
